description: Values returned by the oMailGw API/UI instance

api-url.description: Base URL of the oMailGw API, including the /api suffix.

ui-url.description: URL of the oMailGw web interface.

mailgw-user.description: Relay-side API user email for oMailGw.

mailgw-password.description: Relay-side API user password for oMailGw.
